content.situation: 你在咖啡馆等朋友时，注意到旁边有人在用一款设计独特的笔记本，想自然开启对话
content.speakerText: I love your notebook—where did you get it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我超喜欢你的笔记本——你在哪买的？

blanks.answer: Thanks! I bought it last month
options: Thanks! I bought it last month
I don’t know, someone gave it to me
I stole it from my boss

content.hint: 先感谢对方的赞美，再自然补充一点个人感受
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌回应 + 表达个人体验

content.situation: 你在公园长椅上休息，看到一位陌生人正在喂鸽子，手里拿着一小袋面包，想用观察开启对话
content.speakerText: Those pigeons love you! Do you come here often?
content.speakerTextCn: 这些鸽子好喜欢你啊！你常来这儿吗？
content.responseTemplate: ___, they’re the reason I come every Sunday.

blanks.answer: Yeah, I’ve been feeding them for years
options: Yeah, I’ve been feeding them for years
No, I just happened to have bread
I’m not sure who they belong to
I’m trying to train them to fly to Mars

content.hint: 用肯定回答 + 说明持续性行为来建立真实感
content.knowledgePoint: 用习惯性行为回应观察性提问

content.situation: 你在图书馆安静看书，注意到对面的人正在读一本你也很喜欢的摄影集，想自然搭话
content.speakerText: That’s the same book I’ve been flipping through all week!
content.speakerTextCn: 这正是我这周一直在翻的那本书！
content.responseTemplate: ___, the lighting in these photos is unreal.

options: My cat tore the cover off

content.hint: 用简短共鸣表达认同，避免过度解释
content.knowledgePoint: 用简短共鸣句强化共同兴趣
